about: Propose a new tool idea with a technical document — no code required

## Tool Name

## Summary

<!-- Brief description: what does this tool do and why is it useful? -->

## Technical Document

<!-- REQUIRED: Include the 1-page technical document as tools/your-tool/README.md.
     No code is needed at this stage — if the proposal is accepted, implementation
     work will follow as separate PRs.

     The document should cover:
     - What the tool does and the problem it solves
     - Proposed architecture / how it would work
     - Synth API integration details
     - Expected usage
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] **1-page technical document at `tools/<tool-name>/README.md`**
- [ ] Tool subfolder created under `tools/` (containing only the README for now)
